page: Microsoft Azure E16-4ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Edsv6 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs derived from 2 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 32 GB per vCPU. Local storage is bundled, offering 945 GB of capacity, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark data reveals a distinct performance profile. The server demonstrates strong single-core capabilities, highlighted by a Geekbench single-core score of 2093.0 and single-threaded gzip compression throughput of 30.9 GB/sec. However, multi-core and memory subsystem performance present notable tradeoffs. The stress-ng multi-core CPU performance is categorized as weak, and memory bandwidth benchmarks, such as read-only large block at 34.95 GB/sec and write large block at 24.77 GB/sec, are also weak. Database operations via Passmark score in the average range, while Redis SET operations perform in the bottom 25% tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E16-4ds_v6 offers a high density of memory relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-bound workloads that do not require massive parallel processing power. The inclusion of a 945 GB local disk provides integrated storage capacity without necessitating external attachments. This configuration is best suited for memory-intensive applications with low CPU parallelism requirements, such as medium-sized databases, caching layers, text processing pipelines, and lightweight web serving.
description: The Microsoft Azure E16-4ds_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv6 family, featuring an Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz. It configures 4 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM and 945 GB of local storage. Performance benchmarks show a strong single-core profile, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2093.0 and high single-threaded gzip compression speeds. However, multi-core execution and memory bandwidth are relatively weak, as evidenced by lower stress-ng multi-core and uncached memory read/write metrics. This resource profile offers high memory density relative to compute capacity, making it qualitatively cost-effective for memory-heavy but compute-light tasks. It is best suited for database operations, caching layers, and text processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E16-4ds_v6 is an Edsv6 memory-optimized VM featuring 4 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 945 GB local storage, offering strong single-core performance alongside high memory density.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E16-4ds_v6 is a memory-optimized VM with 4 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 945 GB local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-memory virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing and local storage for memory-intensive, single-core-heavy workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 32.0 GB per vCPU
945 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core performance but weaker multi-core and memory bandwidth
Well-suited for memory-intensive databases, caching, and text processing
